description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Flatpak that triggers on push events. Run a job named Flatpak in a privileged container using the bilelmoussaoui/flatpak-github-actions:kde-6.7 image. Check out the repository code with submodules, then use the flatpak-builder action to create a flatpak bundle. Finally, use the action-gh-release action to create a GitHub release named Continuous with the generated flatpak file.
